title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 288.102 - Rules, procedures
text:
288.102.  Rules, procedures. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of this chapter shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1977 H.B. 707 § 2, A.L. 1981 S.B. 200, A.L. 1994 S.B. 559, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
